steps.title: Use the date threshold
steps.content: The passage says no source before 1155 includes references to the Round Table. Annales Cambriae was composed around 970, so by the passage's timeline it contains no Round Table information.

steps.title: Reject unsupported conclusions
steps.content: A makes unsupported claims about Geoffrey's awareness and source availability. B compares overall content similarity without evidence. D adds an unsupported claim about historical accuracy. The remaining choice follows from the fact that Annales Cambriae lacks Round Table material. The answer is C.
